edge: Rework is an optional step within a production process.
Rework aims to eliminate errors and remedy products that do not meet the desired quality standards.
Reworking a production lot involves repeating a previous stage to ensure the final product meets specifications.
Rework can increase yield by improving product quality but also incurs additional costs.
Rework incurs extra costs due to the need for adjustments and potential part damage.
DML is used to estimate the conditional treatment effect of the rework step on final product yield.
Causal inference is a key aspect of DML in understanding the impact of rework on product yield.

DoubleML is used for policy learning in determining optimal rework strategies for components.
